data.name: 莉絲緹與勃奇諾村
data.detailed_description:
一個破敗的村莊陷入神秘異象，村民發了瘋，嚇得所有女人逃之夭夭。暴脾氣冒險者莉絲緹·阿赫梅接下了公會的委託，踏上調查之路。

然而她剛踏入村莊，怪事便接踵而至。眼見情況失控，莉絲緹想要離開，卻發現整個村莊被無形屏障封鎖。只能繼續深入調查，她必須揭開幕後黑手，以及村民們荒唐行徑背後的真正原因。

探索村莊的各個角落，從村長及其他關鍵人物口中獲取情報。蒐集線索、解開謎題，發現隱藏區域，引導莉絲緹一步步接近真相。幫助莉絲緹直面過去並克服創傷，為迎戰最後的挑戰做好準備，揭開籠罩在這個村莊和村民身上的神秘詛咒。

調查與探索

探索破敗村莊，與居民交談，蒐集線索，揭開神秘現象背後的真相。隨著劇情推進，解鎖隱藏區域，說不定還能發現意想不到的祕密。

各懷心思的角色

有些村民掌握關鍵線索，但不會輕易透露，必須付出代價。也有人看似好心，卻藏有不可告人的目的。為了完成任務，莉絲緹願意走多遠？

輕度解謎要素

挑戰趣味與難度兼具的小謎題，互動解鎖隱藏通道。每解開一個謎題，劇情就向前推進一步。

力量成長系統

遊戲內設有獨特的能力成長機制，依託於與角色的特殊互動。累積足夠力量，也許你將有機會擊敗最強的未知敵人。

回憶房間

通關後可進入回憶房間，解鎖並重溫曾錯過的所有內容，隨時隨地反覆欣賞。

data.short_description: 在這款扭曲的冒險遊戲中，扮演「莉絲緹」，調查荒廢村莊中的瘋狂異變。對話、搜查、追尋真相，是拯救眾人，還是被墮落吞噬？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Risty and the Village of Bocchino
data.detailed_description:
A rundown village is caught up in a mysterious phenomenon. The villagers have gone crazy and scared all the women away. Risty Achmer, a hot-headed adventurer, takes on the guild's request to solve this mystery.

But the moment she steps into the village, terrible things start happening to her. Sensing that things are getting out of hand, Risty tries to leave but is blocked by an invisible barrier surrounding the village. With no choice but to push ahead, Risty must uncover who is behind this and what is causing the villagers to behave in such a shameless and outrageous way.

Investigate the various parts of the village and find out more details from the Village Chief and other important figures. Gather clues, solve puzzles, and discover secret areas that will lead Risty towards the truth. Help Risty come face to face with her past, and overcome it, so that she is ready to face down the final challenge and put an end to whatever is plaguing this village and its people.

Investigation and Exploration

Explore the rundown village, speak with the people, and gather clues to find out more about the mysterious phenomenon that caused the village to change so much. Unlock new and hidden areas as the story progresses, and you might discover something even more interesting along the way.

Unique Characters

Some villagers hold important clues, but they won't share them with Risty without getting something in return. Others may appear generous and ask for nothing, but their true intentions could be hidden. How far will Risty be willing to go to get them to cooperate?

Mini-Puzzles

Engage with small puzzles that offer a good balance between challenge and fun, and interact with the environment to unlock secret passages. Solving each puzzle will push the story forward.

Grow your strength

The game features a unique power-up system tied to various encounters with characters in the story. Gather enough power, and you might be able to take down even the game's strongest unseen foe.

Reminiscence Room

After completing the story, visit the Reminiscence Room to unlock all the content you might have missed and watch it again as many times as you like.

data.short_description: Play as Risty in this twisted adventure game, where you investigate the madness overtaking a desolate village. Talk to people, search for clues, and uncover the sinister force behind their obscene behavior. Will you save the village, or let the corruption consume you as well?
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
